claim: A measurement of how often confident LLM biology claims survive the frozen assay. It is a benchmark result, reproducible offline, not an accepted biological claim.
subject: Haiku 4.5
Sonnet 5
Opus 4.8
Fable 5

evidence.fact: confident major-regulator claims contradicted by the frozen assay
famous checkpoint and cytokine genes overclaimed far above data-confirmed non-regulators
stated confidence does not track correctness
evidence.value: contradiction rate peaks at 71.7% in the 0.80 to 0.95 stated-confidence band

verifier.name: engine/checkers/marson_perturbseq.py
verifier.method: deterministic checker over the frozen DE table, with Wilson intervals and a seeded permutation test; the committed packet re-derives bit-for-bit from committed runs

conditions: computation over released data, not wet-lab or clinical truth
verification_requirements: deterministic checker over the frozen DE table, with Wilson intervals and a seeded permutation test; the committed packet re-derives bit-for-bit from committed runs
scope: computation over released data, not wet-lab or clinical truth
